title: platanthera uniflora
intro: Platanthera uniflora, also known as the one-flowered orchid, is a species of orchid native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, Platanthera uniflora is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
